brand_dna.category: Premium kitchen sinks and taps in exclusive, non-chrome finishes for the UK market.
brand_dna.core_belief: Bringing something new and exciting to the market that gives clients a reliable, problem-free experience.
proof_points: First to introduce PVD sinks and taps to the UK market
Family business based in Lingfield, Surrey, trading since 2012
Sourced from vetted UK, Italy, Slovenia, Poland and US manufacturers with consistent quality
Free specialist technical advice and some of the best product guarantees available
brand_dna.positioning: High-end, design-led specialist for distinct finishes - opposite of the generic chrome mass market.

voice_pillars.name: Design-Led Exclusivity
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to interior-design taste and rare finishes, framing product as a statement rather than a commodity.
voice_pillars.quote: distinct and exclusive kitchen sinks and taps such as copper, gold, bronze, gunmetal

voice_pillars.name: Craft And Provenance
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on materials, hand-work and country of origin to signal quality and authenticity.
voice_pillars.quote: Experience the Art of Cooking Hand-crafted in Italy

voice_pillars.name: Service-First Assurance
voice_pillars.desc: Reassures buyers with personal contact, expert advice and strong guarantees on a high-consideration purchase.
voice_pillars.quote: excellent customer service, including free specialist technical advice

voice_pillars.name: Quietly Confident Innovator
voice_pillars.desc: Positions the brand as a first-mover that seeks out fresh, market-leading products.
voice_pillars.quote: We were the first to introduce PVD sinks and taps to the UK market.

phrases: distinct and exclusive kitchen sinks and taps
For those with passion for cooking
reliable and problem free user experience

icp: Design-conscious UK homeowners and interior designers renovating a kitchen who want a rare, high-end finish and expert guidance, and will pay a premium for it.

personas.name: The Specifying Designer
personas.description: Interior designer sourcing distinct non-chrome finishes for a client project, moved by exclusivity, provenance and technical support.

personas.name: The Statement Renovator
personas.description: Homeowner mid-renovation wanting a standout sink or tap, moved by finish colours, hand-crafted detail and the wow factor.

personas.name: The Passionate Home Cook
personas.description: Serious cook investing in a workstation sink, moved by function, durability and the art-of-cooking angle.

products_ladder.title: Quadron Logan 110 Black Diamond, topmount or undermount sink
Artinox Planum XT 141 undermount multi-level sink
Crudo Naomi kitchen mixer tap, Patinated Brass
Quadron Logan 120 White, topmount or undermount sink

offers: 14 calendar day cooling-off returns period for non-trade customers
Full refund or exchange on faulty or transit-damaged goods (report within 3 days)
Product guarantees / warranty and trade account registration

allowed.claim: First to introduce PVD sinks and taps to the UK market
Family business based in Lingfield, Surrey, since 2012
Marine grade stainless steel, made in Italy (Artinox outdoor sink)
Free specialist technical advice and product guarantees
Crudo Patinated Brass sinks made of raw brass

banned.claim: Any disease-treatment or health-benefit claim about water from the taps (e.g. filtered taps that 'boost immunity')
banned.why: Food and beverage compliance - banned disease-treatment and immunity claims

banned.claim: Unqualified 'detox' or 'purifying' language for filtered water taps
banned.why: Food and beverage compliance - unqualified detox claims are banned

banned.claim: 'Natural' or 'clean' as a standalone headline claim for finishes or water
banned.why: Food and beverage compliance - 'natural'/'clean' are vague and risky as headline claims

banned.claim: Nutrient-content style claims about tap water (e.g. 'high mineral', 'low contaminant') without matching test data
banned.why: Food and beverage compliance - nutrient-content claims must match verifiable label/data

banned.claim: 'Best guarantees in the marketplace' stated as absolute without qualification
banned.why: Superlative comparative claim not substantiated - risk under advertising truth/comparison rules
